name: Edinburgh Tearoom Scones/Lemon Curd
recipeInstructions:
Scones:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Sift together dry ingredients.
3. Cut in butter until mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
4. Add raisins or currents.
5. Mix buttermilk and egg separately.
6. Combine all at once with flour using a fork, just until it clings together.
7. Form into a ball, turn onto a floured surface, and gently knead 2-3 times.
8. Pat into an 1/2-inch thick rectangle. Using a 2-inch cutter, cut scones apart.
9. Place on a baking sheet about 1 inch apart.
10. Brush tops with milk and sprinkle with sugar.
11. Bake for 10 minutes until golden brown.
Lemon Curd:
1. Beat eggs in a double boiler over simmering water.
2. Stir in remaining ingredients.
3. Cook, stirring frequently, for 30 minutes or until thick and smooth.
4. Remove from heat; let cool. It will thicken more as it cools.
5. Cover and refrigerate for up to 3 weeks.
